text: Every clinic deserves the same AI advantage that billion-dollar health systems take for granted. MedAutomate brings healthcare automation to small practices without the $150K consultant price tag. https://t.co/02A5rItqvw

urls.title: MedAutomate — AI That Runs Your Clinic Admin
urls.description: Your front desk spends 12+ hours a week on hold with insurance companies. We fix that. $900/month, all-in.
